title: Refreshing Light Portuguese Chicken Curry
description: A kid-friendly and ayurvedic sattvic friendly Portuguese dish featuring yellow curry paste, this refreshing curry is perfect for spring, with floral and light flavors.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and prepare an ice bath.
Submerge the chicken in the boiling water for 30 seconds, then immediately transfer it to the ice bath to stop the cooking process.
In a large pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the onion until it is translucent.
Add the garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Stir in the yellow curry paste and cook for 1 minute, until the paste is fragrant.
Add the coconut milk, water, salt, and black pepper to the pan and stir to combine.
Add the chicken to the pan and simmer, uncovered, until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the chopped cilantro and serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
